pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which copies the dataset to this location.
Confirmed via verifier.py which checks this path for the exported CSV.
Confirmed via verifier.py which expects the JASP project file at this location.
Downloaded the dataset from JASP's GitHub repository and verified the CSV headers contain 'Exam' and 'Revise'.
Checked verifier.py which explicitly looks for the 'Efficiency' column in the output CSV.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'Exam Anxiety' educational dataset, originally created by Andy Field (2013) for his textbooks. It is a synthetic dataset despite the environment installation script claiming it is real. The source data contains 103 observations and includes the columns 'Exam' and 'Revise', which are used to compute a new target column named 'Efficiency'. The dataset is placed at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv for the task.
